login.title: Login
login.heroDescription: Personal finance app that helps you track transactions, set budgets, and grow your savings.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.failedLogin: Failed to log in. Please check your connection.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.name: Name
signup.haveAccount: Do you already have an account?
signup.heroDescription: Create an account to start tracking income, expenses, and budgets.

errors.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordMin: Your password must contain at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordUpper: Your password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.passwordLower: Your password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
errors.passwordNumber: Your password must contain at least one number.
errors.nameMin: Your name must be at least 2 characters long.
errors.emailInUse: This email address is already in use.
errors.checkInput: Please check your input and try again.
errors.registrationFail: We could not complete your registration at the moment. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred during registration.

signup.successMessage: We have sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and verify your account before logging in.

verify.verifying: Verifying your email address, please wait...
verify.successMessage: Your email address has been verified successfully!

potsCard.title: Pots
potsCard.empty: No pots yet. Start saving by adding a pot!

budgetsCard.title: Budgets
budgetsCard.empty: No budgets set. Add a budget to track your spending.

transactionsCard.title: Transactions
transactionsCard.empty: No transactions yet. Add your first income or expense!

budgetsPage.title: Budgets
budgetsPage.emptyMessage: Set spending limits for different categories to help you monitor and control your spending.
budgetsPage.duplicateAlert: You already have a budget for {{category}}. Please choose a different category or edit the existing one.
budgetsPage.duplicateAlertEdit: You already have a budget for {{category}}. Please choose a different category.

addBudgetForm.title: Add New Budget
addBudgetForm.subtitle: Choose a category to set a spending budget. These categories can help you monitor spending.

errors.validAmount: Please enter a valid maximum spend amount.
errors.chooseTheme: Please choose a theme for this budget.

editBudgetForm.title: Edit Budget
editBudgetForm.subtitle: Update the category, maximum spend, or theme for this budget.

deleteBudget.title: Delete '{{category}}'?
deleteBudget.message: Are you sure you want to delete this budget? This action cannot be reversed, and all the data inside it will be removed forever.

potsPage.title: Pots
potsPage.emptyMessage: 'Pots' help you save for specific goals. Click the button below to create your first savings pot and start tracking your progress!

potCard.goalReachedModalMsg: You've reached your goal for "{{name}}". Your saving discipline really paid off!

addPotForm.title: Add New Pot
addPotForm.subtitle: Create a pot to help you track savings for special purchases.
addPotForm.name: Pot Name

errors.validTarget: Please enter a valid target amount.

editPotForm.title: Edit Pot
editPotForm.subtitle: Update the name, target amount, or theme for this pot.

addMoneyForm.title: Add to '{{name}}'
addMoneyForm.subtitle: Add money to your pot to keep it separate from your main balance.
addMoneyForm.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid amount to add.

withdrawForm.title: Withdraw from '{{name}}'
withdrawForm.subtitle: Withdraw money from your pot. This will be added back to your main balance.
withdrawForm.errorExceeds: Withdrawal amount cannot exceed the saved amount.
withdrawForm.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid positive amount.

deletePot.title: Delete '{{name}}'?
deletePot.message: Are you sure you want to delete this pot? This action cannot be reversed, and all the data inside it will be removed forever.

incomeExpense.title: Income & Expense
incomeExpense.emptyMessage: Keep track of your financial activities. Add your income sources and daily expenses to see a clear summary of your budget.
incomeExpense.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be reversed.

addTxForm.title: Add New Transaction
addTxForm.subtitleExpense: Fill in the details to log your spending.
addTxForm.subtitleIncome: Fill in the details to log your earnings.
addTxForm.errorCategory: Please select a category for this expense.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.welcomeMessage: Start adding transactions to see your performance metrics and spending insights.
analytics.noExpenseData: No expense data found. Add your first transaction to see your spending categorized.
analytics.noCashflowData: No cashflow activity. Record your incomes and expenses to monitor your net trend.
analytics.noDistData: Discover where your money goes. Add expenses to generate this pie chart.
analytics.noPortfolioData: Track your investments over time. Add assets to see your profit and loss metrics.
analytics.noPeriodData: No expense data for the selected period.
analytics.noPeriodCashflow: No cashflow data for the selected period.
analytics.noPeriodPortfolio: No portfolio data for the selected period.
analytics.ppcEmptyMsg: Start investing to see your performance chart here.

portfolio.title: Markets
portfolio.marketClosedMsg: Forex markets are closed on weekends. The displayed rates are from the last trading day.
portfolio.noHoldingsMsg: Click "+ Add Asset" to start tracking your portfolio.
portfolio.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this asset? This action cannot be reversed, and all the transaction data inside it will be removed forever.
portfolio.deleteTxMsg: This will permanently remove the {{type}} of {{amount}} {{asset}}. Your holdings will be recalculated.
portfolio.convSubtitle: Convert any currency to TRY at the live rate

addAssetForm.title: Add New Asset
addAssetForm.subtitle: Choose an asset and enter the amount to add to your portfolio.

errors.chooseAsset: Please choose an asset to continue.
errors.validAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than zero.

bills.title: Recurring Bills
bills.noBillsMsg: Add your recurring bills to track due dates and stay on top of your payments.

billForm.addSubtitle: Add a recurring bill to track your monthly expenses.
billForm.editSubtitle: Update the details for this recurring bill.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.pwMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
settings.pwChangedModalMsg: You're being redirected to the login page. Please sign in with your new password.
settings.darkModeHelp: Switch between light and dark theme.
settings.sidebarSideHelp: Move the menu to the left or right side of the screen.
settings.exportHelp: Generate a report of all your transactions ({{count}} records) with income, expense and net totals.
settings.pdfFailed: Could not generate the PDF. Please try again.
settings.popupBlocked: Could not open the print window. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
settings.deleteHelp: Permanently delete your account and all related data (transactions, budgets, pots, bills, portfolio). This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete your account and all related data. To confirm, enter your password and type DELETE below.

chat.errorMsg: Something went wrong {{name}}, would you mind trying again?
chat.greeting:
Hi {{name}}! 👋 Here's what I can do for you:
• 💸 Add a new income/expense (just say "I spent 150 TL at Bistro")
• 🎯 Create a savings pot ("Open a 200000 TL pot for the car")
• 💰 Create budgets or reallocate between categories
• 📈 Record gold/currency buy-sell on your portfolio
• 📊 Draw a spending chart ("chart the last 7 days of expenses")
• 🔍 Analyze your spending habits and tell if you're on track with your goals

Which one shall we start with?

chartModal.subtitle: {{name}}, here's your breakdown by category.
chartModal.emptyTitle: Couldn't find any records in this range.
chartModal.emptyHint: Want to try a different date range?

logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to sign in again to access your account.
